context: This is the capstone for Everyday Life. You already have the pieces - now combine them into full answers that sound like real conversation.
explanation: No major new vocabulary here. The main idea is recombination: who you are, where you live, what you do, how often, and how you feel - in connected sentences instead of isolated lines.

examples.es: soy de Noruega y vivo en un apartamento
examples.en: I am from Norway and I live in an apartment

examples.es: normalmente me levanto a las siete y trabajo por la mañana
examples.en: I usually get up at seven and work in the morning

examples.es: despues del trabajo voy al gimnasio y vuelvo a casa
examples.en: after work I go to the gym and return home

examples.es: los fines de semana viajo con amigos
examples.en: on weekends I travel with friends
today I am tired but happy
